login.ssoIntro: Access is managed by the RWA Core authentication portal.
login.footer: Restricted to authorized Reliance West Africa staff. All sign-ins are logged (compliance framework §10).

errors.credentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
errors.accountDisabled: Your account is disabled. Contact an administrator.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information, password and preferences.

infos.emailHelp: This email identifies you on the platform.

preferences.languageHelp: The selected language is remembered for future sign-ins.

session.title: Session
session.help: If you have any doubt about your session security, sign out and sign in again.

verifyRequest.title: Link sent
verifyRequest.body: If the address is recognized, an email with a sign-in link has just been sent. The link expires in 10 minutes.

setPassword.title: Set a password
setPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password to finalize access to your account.
setPassword.constraints: At least 12 characters mixing uppercase, lowercase, digits and symbols.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operational summary of your scope.
dashboard.intro: Consolidated view of the financial cycle — suppliers, expense requests, offer comparisons, purchase orders, goods receipts, invoices (3-way match), treasury and SYSCOHADA accounting.
dashboard.noEntity: You are not attached to any entity yet.

roles.title: Your roles
roles.empty: No active role. Contact your administrator to obtain your permissions.

dashboard.systemStatus: System operational · all sign-ins are logged (compliance framework §10).

reporting.title: Reporting & KPIs
reporting.subtitle: Consolidated financial indicators by entity, period and category.
reporting.introConsolidated: Consolidated view: compliance, lead time, emergencies, budget vs actual, top anomalies (framework §10).

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Supplier lifecycle + bank account anti-fraud (framework §8). Last 100 results max.

new.title: New supplier
new.subtitle: Light KYC onboarding: RCCM/IFU + initial bank account (later verified via dual approval — framework §8).
new.bankHelp: The bank account will initially be marked UNVERIFIED. It must be verified through the dual approval workflow (Country CFO + Group CFO) before it can be used for payments.

detail.dangerZoneHelp: Archiving is logged and reversible only via admin SQL query. Existing POs and invoices remain viewable.

bankAccounts.title: Bank accounts - {supplierName}
bankAccounts.subtitle: Anti-fraud bank account cycle: request → L1 → L2 → 24h quarantine → active (framework §8).

changeForm.title: Bank account change request
changeForm.help: Dual approval required (L1 + L2) followed by a 24h quarantine before use.
changeForm.justificationPlaceholder: Written justification required (framework §8) — e.g., new account opened, bank change, etc.

history.title: Bank account history - {supplierName}
history.subtitle: Tamper-proof via SHA-256 chaining. Last 200 entries.

expenseRequests.title: Expense requests
expenseRequests.subtitle: FDA / FD / FD_URGENCE with threshold-based approval workflow (framework §5 + §7).
expenseRequests.pagination: Last 100 results max. Column sort + pagination: polish session.

new.title: New expense request
new.subtitle: Draft → Submission → Signature chain computed from thresholds + supplier sensitivity.

fields.title: Title / subject *
fields.titlePlaceholder: e.g. cement purchase CIDPE site - lot 4

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase orders & Contracts
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Cascaded signature workflow + supplier bank account snapshot (framework §6 + §8).

fields.paymentTermsPlaceholder: e.g. 100% after reception + receipt + conformant invoice

actions.title: Actions
actions.lockedHelp: PO locked after submission. Post-signature edits: amendment procedure (to ship in polish session).

receptions.title: Goods receipts (Model 4)
receptions.subtitle: OPS → TECH → FINANCE workflow. "No receipt = no final payment" (framework §4.1).
receptions.empty: No receipt. Create one from a signed PO record.

new.title: New goods receipt

fields.requiresTechnical: Technical check required (recommended for technical goods)

new.help: Lines will be pre-filled from the PO. You can adjust received quantities and mark non-conformities before signature.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Supplier invoices received and their payment lifecycle.
invoices.listSubtitle: 3-way match (PO vs GR vs Invoice) + "No GR = no payment" safeguard (framework §4.1, §5).

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Issued and scheduled payments across the scope.
payments.listSubtitle: IBAN anti-fraud + dual validation + mandatory bank proof (framework §5 step 7 + §8).

cashForecast.title: 13-week cash forecast
cashForecast.subtitle: Rolling projection: opening + inflows - outflows = closing per week (framework §3.5). CFO notification on projected shortfall.

detect.title: Shortfall detection
detect.description: Runs analysis + creates an Anomaly + notifies CFO/Treasurer if shortfall projected at D+15 or less. Severity CRITICAL if shortfall in 14 days or less.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Monthly periods + entries auto-generated from payments/invoices (framework §5 step 8). Closing = retroactive lock.

close.title: Close
close.warning: Requires all DRAFT entries to be posted or deleted.

list.title: Periods ({count})
list.empty: No period. Create one via the form above.

anomalies.title: Anomalies
anomalies.subtitle: Automated detection: duplicate invoices, split payments, missing GRNs, DRAFT > 30d, repeated urgencies, suspicious bank accounts (framework §13).
anomalies.empty: No anomaly. Run controls to scan.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Consolidated audit log — user and system actions.
audit.headerSubtitle: Append-only with SHA-256 chaining. Verifiable via

chains.title: Verify the integrity of a chain

audit.footer: Display limited to the 100 most recent entries. Pagination + CSV export: session 9 (M13).

offerComparisons.title: Offer comparisons (Template 1)
offerComparisons.subtitle: 2-3 offers compared with a justified recommendation (framework §6).

recommendation.title: Recommendation
recommendation.justificationPlaceholder: Justification (>= 30 characters): why this offer vs. the others?

new.title: Sole-source justification (Template 2)
new.subtitle: Waiver from the 3-offer rule (framework §6). Written justification required.

safeguards.legend: Safeguard measures (at least 2 of 4 required for approval)
safeguards.warrantyOrPenalty: Warranty / penalties included in the PO

detail.subtitle: Sole-source justification - Template 2 (framework §6)
detail.approveHint: Approval available if at least 2 safeguard measures are ticked.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Invite, list, deactivate. Every action is recorded in the audit log.

invite.title: Invite a user
invite.description: A magic-link email will be sent. The user will set their password on first sign-in.

info.invited: Invitation sent to the user (check Mailhog in dev).
info.createdNoEmail: User created but the email could not be sent.

memberships.title: Roles and entities
memberships.subtitle: A user can hold several roles across different entities (e.g. Group Auditor + Togo CFO).

entities.title: Group entities
entities.subtitle: Holding → Subsidiaries → SPV hierarchy. Every creation is logged (framework §2.2 + §12).

chartAccounts.title: SYSCOHADA chart of accounts
chartAccounts.empty: No account. Run `pnpm db:seed` to load the initial SYSCOHADA chart.
chartAccounts.subtitle: Extensible without code changes. Classes 1-7 follow the revised SYSCOHADA framework (§12, OHADA compliance).

thresholds.title: Validation thresholds
thresholds.subtitle: Versioned by effectiveFrom. Every change creates a new entry and closes the previous one. In-flight cases keep their original threshold; new cases use the active threshold (framework §5).

form.heading: New threshold or replacement
form.hint: If an active threshold already exists for (type, entity), it is automatically closed (effectiveTo = now).

list.heading: Active thresholds and history
list.empty: No threshold. Run `pnpm db:seed` to load the default values.
